04/25/26
rendering
Particle Foundation
particle_system
v1.0.0
active
Defines the core particle simulation layer including motion, gravity, decay, and rendering. Serves as the foundational output system for all emitter and behavior-driven effects.

Wall of Sound

Shared project memory for the StudioRich audio/visual system. Specs, logs, recovery notes, and local portals live here.
